title: Basic Store Creation
description: Creating a simple Zustand store with create() and hook-based consumption.

title: Slices Pattern with DevTools
description: Structuring large stores with slices pattern and devtools middleware.

title: Persist Middleware
description: Persisting store state to localStorage or sessionStorage.

title: Immer Middleware
description: Using Immer for mutable-style state updates.

title: Combining Middlewares (devtools + persist)
description: Stacking devtools and persist middlewares with proper TypeScript types.

title: subscribeWithSelector - Partial State Subscriptions
description: Subscribe to specific state slices outside React components with custom equality and fireImmediately options.

title: State Access Outside React Components
description: Using getState, setState, and subscribe directly on the store for non-React contexts.

title: Store Factory for Next.js SSR
description: Creating store instances per-request in Next.js to prevent shared state between requests.

title: Testing - Mock Module with Auto-Reset
description: Jest/Vitest mock that captures initial state and auto-resets all stores after each test.

title: Reset Store to Initial State
description: Pattern for resetting store to initial state using getInitialState().

title: Combining devtools + persist + immer
description: Stacking three middlewares for debugging, persistence, and mutable-style updates.

title: Persist with skipHydration and Manual Rehydrate
description: Fine-grained control over when persisted state is loaded, useful for SSR/SSG.
